name_en: Genuine Leather Top-tier Original Batch🔥GG Crescent Mini Bag. This mini bag features a crescent shape with GG Supreme canvas, exuding a rich retro vibe. Each brand series is dedicated to exploring different eras, and this mini accessory embodies the brand's passion for the past. Adjustable handle (17cm) Metal chain strap (60cm) Model: 726843 Dimensions: 22 x 12.5 x 5cm
